title: The Commander Battles Intensify
description: On pages 13–16, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Tama, Unknown person #14, Queen, Unknown person #15, Unknown person #16 as The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.
scene: The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This serpentine form is the true nature of the Brachio- Saurus!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: How's that supposed to work?! Dammit!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is bad!! Sangoro- San will be killed!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...have had their bones crushed under this pressure...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is a disappointing performance for Judge's Brait!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you show me the capabilities of Germa,

dialogue.speaker: Queen
dialogue.text: If I were a normal brachio- Saurus,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Those legs would just be little more than sheded skin...

dialogue.speaker: Queen
dialogue.text: I've equipped Brachio Launchers to my Torso!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As soon as I mention them. They'll take aim and blow you to...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Not yet, Dammt! I was only explaining...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I was just referencing it. I didn't tell you to use the Brachio launcher!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Forget it, he's already as good as dead!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: I crushed him with my coiling move!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: But I can still move, no problem!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All the bones in sangoro- San's body are broken!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: What the hell is with my body...?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't tell me I've awakened the same ability they have...?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't want to be a monster too!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 52 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
